# The Gifts of Galadriel

> [!abstract] ⚪ Contract · Neutral

![[505062.png]]

---

**Side A**
Your deck must be exactly half allies and half attachments.
**Setup**: Flip this card over.
**Side B**
**Action**: Play ally Galadriel from your hand for no cost. You do not need a resource match.
**Response**: When you play or put into play an attachment, exhaust either Galadriel or The Gifts of Galadriel to attach it to a character that would be ineligible due to its **_Traits_** or resource icons. Then, either draw 1 card or add 1 resource to the pool of a hero you control. If another player now controls that attachment, do both instead. (Limit twice per round.)

---

> *“We have drunk the cup of parting,” she said, “and the shadows fall between us. But before you go, I have brought in my ship gifts which the Lord and Lady of the Galadhrim now offer you in memory of Lothlórien.” —Galadriel, The Fellowship of the Ring*

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Mirror of Galadriel]] #62 · Limit 1 per deck
